rights_boundary: agency marks, seals, series trade dress and visual layout not needed for prose
reason: all visual branding and decorative layout excluded
photo, caption, depicted configuration and image-derived claims excluded
photo, caption, material detail and image-derived failure claims excluded
photo, caption, equipment, configuration and procedure excluded

rights_boundary: personal contact information and organizational detail
reason: names, roles, telephone numbers, email addresses and collaborator block excluded from training prose

rights_boundary: legal requirement, external organization text and numeric capacity
reason: all legal citation, organization identity, capacity, number and requirement language excluded
proof-load method, test procedure, acceptance criteria and operational recommendation excluded

rights_boundary: brand and product identities plus precise test result
reason: all brands, dimensions, capacities, units, proof-load claims and operational inference excluded

rights_boundary: exact configuration, incorporated requirements and numerical multi-anchor example
reason: all numbers, thresholds, standards, pair configuration and instruction excluded; only non-additivity and angle sensitivity abstracted

rights_boundary: exact threshold context and component mechanics
reason: capacity context, component identity and detailed mechanism excluded; only progressive-versus-abrupt diversity retained

rights_boundary: protected report details and separate operational manual
reason: report-derived details, manual title, incorporation plan and recommendations excluded; no protected source accessed
quotation, attribution, title and mission claim excluded

rights_boundary: future tests, equipment, configurations and procedures
external organizations, standards committees and legal or practice material
reason: all names, history, standard-setting claims and incorporated requirements excluded
body not requested, accessed, inferred, reconstructed or quoted; only the access boundary is recorded

rights_boundary: people, contact links, exact history, timelines, conferences, manufacturers and validity or endorsement claims
reason: all named-person, contact, timeline, commercial, endorsement and review claims excluded from training prose
